intro: Compare climate risk between ACT Remainder - Stromlo, Australian Capital Territory and ACT Remainder - Weston Creek, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: ACT Remainder - Weston Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to ACT Remainder - Stromlo (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is ACT Remainder - Stromlo or ACT Remainder - Weston Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: ACT Remainder - Stromlo has a flood risk score of 44/100, while ACT Remainder - Weston Creek scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: ACT Remainder - Stromlo scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. ACT Remainder - Weston Creek scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in ACT Remainder - Stromlo or ACT Remainder - Weston Creek?
